basicDetails.implementingAgency: Uttarakhand State Council For Science And Technology

schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The scheme “Artificial Intelligence” is implemented by the Uttarakhand State Council for Science and Technology (UCOST) under the Science and Technology, Government of Uttarakhand. It aims to promote awareness, understanding, and practical learning of Artificial Intelligence among school students from classes 9 to 12 and provide them with opportunities to participate in AI coding camps and hands-on experiments.
schemeContent.benefits_md: UCOST, Regional Science Center, Dehradun, in collaboration with Intel, has established an AI Skills Lab under the AI for Youth program. Students from classes 9 to 12 across the state can participate in AI coding camps and perform hands-on experiments.
schemeContent.briefDescription: The scheme aims to promote awareness, understanding, and practical learning of Artificial Intelligence among school students from classes 9 to 12 and provide them with opportunities to participate in AI coding camps and hands-on experiments.

children.text: The scheme “Artificial Intelligence” is implemented by the Uttarakhand State Council for Science and Technology (UCOST) under the Science and Technology, Government of Uttarakhand. It aims to promote awareness, understanding, and practical learning of Artificial Intelligence among school students from classes 9 to 12 and provide them with opportunities to participate in AI coding camps and hands-on experiments.

UCOST, Regional Science Center, Dehradun, in collaboration with Intel, has established an AI Skills Lab under the AI for Youth program. Students from classes 9 to 12 across the state can participate in AI coding camps and perform hands-on experiments.

Schools can register for the AI camp and demonstration sessions. Registration for the AI awareness lectures can be completed by filling out the AI registration form and sending it via email to rscdehradoon@gmail.com and rscdoonai@gmail.com. No additional documents, other than the registration form, are required.

applicationProcess.process_md: Schools can register for the AI camp and demonstration sessions. Registration for the AI awareness lectures can be completed by filling out the AI registration form and sending it via email to rscdehradoon@gmail.com and rscdoonai@gmail.com. No additional documents, other than the registration form, are required.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md: - The applicant must be a student of class 9 to 12 studying in a government or private school in Uttarakhand.

children.text: The applicant must be a student of class 9 to 12 studying in a government or private school in Uttarakhand.
